en: Hey. My friend was here earlier.
Um, bald fella? About so tall?
Yeah. Did they find his brother-in-law? Is he okay?
No, no. No, we haven't found him yet.
We're really worried. Sorry to hear about that.
So, I was wondering if there's maybe something that, you know, my friend missed?
I showed him everything I've got.
Show me what you showed him.
Maybe you should just call your friend.
I did. And, you know, he told me to come back and take another look. I...
You better just call the police.
Sure. Sure. Travel Wire. This is Fred.
